description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Addressed to a 'brother.' There are 4 lines of standard introductory material, then 3 lines of the sender's annoyance that the addressee hasn't been responding to his letters (innanī ʿatbān ʿalayk). Mentions "this difficult time." This is reminiscent of Shelomo b. Eliyyahu's letters; needs further examination for identification. but  Verso is covered with jottings in Hebrew and Arabic script.
